title.en: STEAM OR VAPOUR CONDENSERS (condensation of vapours B01D5/00; steam engine plants having condensers F01K; liquefaction of gases F25J; details of heat-exchange and heat-transfer arrangements of general application F28F)
Condensers in which the steam or vapour is separate from the cooling medium by walls, e.g. surface condenser
using water or other liquid as the cooling medium
using air or other gas as the cooling medium
Condensers in which the steam or vapour comes into direct contact with the cooling medium
by providing a flowing coating of cooling liquid on the condensing surface
by injecting cooling liquid into the steam or vapour (F28B3/08 takes precedence)
by injecting the steam or vapour into the cooling liquid (F28B3/08 takes precedence)
Condensers employing a combination of the methods covered by main groups F28B1/00 and F28B3/00; Other condensers
Combinations of two or more condensers, e.g. provision of reserve condenser
for feeding steam or vapour to condensers
for feeding, collecting, and storing cooling water or other cooling liquid
for extracting, cooling, and removing non-condensable gases
Controlling arrangements with features specially adapted for condensers (control arrangements in general G05)
